posts.text:
Energy stocks are experiencing a historic run:

The S&P 500 Energy Index has reached 20 all-time highs so far in 2026, the most in a single year since 2013.

By comparison, the longest streak over the last 36 years was 41 all-time highs in 2007.

To put this into perspective, during the 2004-2008 period, energy stocks hit all-time highs at least 10 times per year.

Year-to-date, the S&P 500 Energy Index is up +29%, on track for the best annual performance since 2022.

Since the 2020 pandemic, the index is up +367%, more than double the +175% return of the S&P 500.

The bull market in energy stocks is gaining momentum.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
the current TSA mess is american politics in a nutshell.

the basic issue itself is manufactured and either side could break this deadlock but neither will.

the dems added policy terms/riders to a "must pass" funding bill to try and force them through.

the GOP are refusing to pass it because of those terms which would limit and hamstring ICE, provide asylum, etc.

the dems offer to split the bill and fund TSA.  the GOP is saying no.

and everything deadlocks.

and so DHS goes unfunded and the pain gets piled on us while the donkeys and elephants play at brinksmanship.

they both love it.  

the GOP get to yell and fundraise on "the donkeys won't limit immigration or let us arrest illegals!"

the dems get to yell and fundraise on "the GOP shut down the airports with bill riders!" and claim that "the jackboot republicans want to arrest your gardener!"

both sides think they are benefiting from the positioning and neither seems to care that there is a country full of people attached to their partisan poo flinging and the wreckage it inflicts.

this whole "and now it takes 3 hours to check in at the airport" is a contrived and needless problem.  they generated it to play politics by inflicting pain on americans because this stuff is cash contribution gold and it benefits them.

the entire american political class has become a vicious parasite.  they do not care what happens to we the people so long as their money keeps flowing.

and if you doubt this, consider:  wev'e seen 1000 stories about corruption, graft, theft, mysterious $30 or 3000 million fortunes accumulated in a few years on a $175k salary.  everyone sees it.  they agree it's an issue, talk about it on TV, stump speech about it, but has anyone actually done a damn thing to stop it?

has anyone been investigated, held accountable, arrested?  has any of the money been taken back?  nope.  nada.  zilch.  all the outrage is fake.  there is just the swamp.  and the swamp will lie and accuse and its dwellers will vilify one another and accuse each other of every kind of immorality and stupidity.  but it's a just a cacophony of calumny played as pantomime and devolving to farce.

congress and the permanent state is a rancid and corrupt aristocracy.  nothing more.

they do not serve the people, their serve themselves.

they will not solve the problem because they are the problem. 

and they will never allow accountability because, above all else, the swamp protects its own.
posts.author: hkuppy
